name: E. coli Nissle 1917
shortDescription: A probiotic E. coli used in humans for over a century (Mutaflor). Colonizes the gut safely, making it the chassis of choice for clinical / gut biomarker biosensors.

safety.humanUse: Marketed as the probiotic Mutaflor; used clinically for gastrointestinal indications.
safety.biocontainment: Engineered auxotrophies (e.g. thyA, dapA) demonstrated for gut-restricted containment.
safety.bslSource: ABSA Risk Group 1; established probiotic with extensive human-safety record.
safety.notes: Lacks defined virulence factors of pathogenic E. coli; strong gut colonization.

engineering.crisprTools: Standard E. coli dCas9/CRISPRi tooling transfers to EcN.
